content.problemStatement:
These days, Chef is working on opening a restaurant. Obviously, Chef dislikes running the restaurant by himself. In order to avoid such a terrible thing, he decided to hire exactly MMM workers (numbered 111 through MMM) to help him.

The workers will choose some positive integer constants a1,a2,‚Ä¶,aMa_1, a_2, \dots, a_Ma1‚Äã,a2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,aM‚Äã. A worker with a constant aaa wants to be paid a fixed salary after each aaa days. Chef is very orderly, so he wants to choose a Chef-year ‚Äî a period of xxx days, and a Chef-week ‚Äî a period of yyy days, where xxx and yyy depend on the workers' constants in such a way that Chef can always pay each worker's salary at the end of a Chef-week and all the workers are paid their salaries at once at the end of a Chef-year.

Chef also wants a Chef-year to be as short as possible and a Chef-week to be as long as possible. It can be shown that these conditions are satisfied when xxx is the lowest common multiple of a1,a2,‚Ä¶,aMa_1, a_2, \dots, a_Ma1‚Äã,a2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,aM‚Äã and yyy is the greatest common divisor of a1,a2,‚Ä¶,aMa_1, a_2, \dots, a_Ma1‚Äã,a2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,aM‚Äã. For a group of MMM workers with known a1,a2,‚Ä¶,aMa_1, a_2, \dots, a_Ma1‚Äã,a2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,aM‚Äã, Chef then defines the value of the group as xpf(y)x^p f(y)xpf(y)Ôºåwhere f(x)=‚àëi=0qfixq‚àíif(x) = \sum_{i = 0}^q f_i x^{q-i}f(x)=‚àëi=0q‚Äãfi‚Äãxq‚àíi is a polynomial of degree qqq.

Now, Chef wants to know the sum of values of the group of MMM workers over all possible sequences a1,a2,‚Ä¶,aMa_1, a_2, \dots, a_Ma1‚Äã,a2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,aM‚Äã which meet the constraint x‚â§Nx \le Nx‚â§N. Since the answer may be extremely large, you should compute it modulo 109+710^9 + 7109+7.

**Note**: This problem has a stricter submission limit, each user may only submit this problem at most 50 times during the contest.
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains four space-separated integers NNN, MMM, ppp and qqq.
The second line contains q+1q+1q+1 space-separated integers f0,f1,‚Ä¶,fqf_0, f_1, \ldots, f_qf0‚Äã,f1‚Äã,‚Ä¶,fq‚Äã ‚Äî the coefficients of the polynomial fff.
content.outputFormat: Print a single line containing one integer ‚Äî the sum of values for all possible groups of workers modulo 109+710^9 + 7109+7.
